headline: Assessing Abbott Laboratories (ABT) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Abbott Laboratories (ABT) has come into focus after recent share price pressure, with the stock showing negative returns over the past month and past 3 months. This has prompted investors to reassess its current valuation and fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Abbott Laboratories. At a share price of US$105.46, Abbott’s recent 30 day share price return of 6.02% and year to date share price return of 15.08% sit against a 1 year total shareholder return of 14.96%.
